name: Santana Minerals Limited
summary: Santana Minerals Limited engages in the exploration and evaluation of gold, silver, and base metal properties in Laos, Mexico and Chile. It holds interest in Becker Gold Project located in Chile; Cuitaboca Silver-Gold Project located in Mexico; and Sayabouly Project located in Laos. Santana Minerals Limited was incorporated in 2013 and is based in Brisbane, Australia.
